=================
Structure Literal
=================

#check {x := 12}
#check {x := 12, y := (fun z => z)}

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (structure_instance
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))))
  (hash_command
    (structure_instance
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (parenthesized
          (fun
            binders: (identifier)
            body: (identifier)))))))

=======================
Typed Structure Literal
=======================

#check {x := 12 : Foo}
#check {x := 12, y := (fun z => z) : Foo Bar}
#check {: Foo}

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (structure_instance
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))
      type: (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (structure_instance
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (parenthesized
          (fun
            binders: (identifier)
            body: (identifier))))
      type: (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (identifier))))
  (hash_command
    (structure_instance
      type: (identifier))))

====================
Structure Overriding
====================

#check {foo with x := 12}
#check {foo with x := 12, y := (fun z => z)}
#check {foo with}
#check {bar 37 with x := 12}

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (structure_instance
      extends: (identifier)
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))))
  (hash_command
    (structure_instance
      extends: (identifier)
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number))
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (parenthesized
          (fun
            binders: (identifier)
            body: (identifier))))))
  (hash_command
    (structure_instance
      extends: (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (structure_instance
      extends: (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (number))
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number)))))

===================
Trailing Commas Yay
===================

example : Foo := {x := 12, y := 13,}

---

(module
  (example
    (identifier)
    (structure_instance
      (identifier)
      (number)
      (identifier)
      (number))))

=====================
No Trailing Commas Aw
=====================

#check (1, 2, 3,)
#check [1, 2, 3,]
#check #[1, 2, 3,]
example : Foo := ⟨1, 2,⟩
@[foo, bar,] def foo := 12
def foo | 0, => 2 | _, => 3

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (parenthesized
      (number)
      (tuple_tail
        (number)
        (number))
      (ERROR)))
  (hash_command
    (list
      (number)
      (number)
      (number)
      (identifier
        (MISSING _identifier))))
  (hash_command
    (array
      (number)
      (number)
      (number)
      (identifier
        (MISSING _identifier))))
  (example
    (identifier)
    (anonymous_constructor
      (number)
      (number)
      (identifier
        (MISSING _identifier))))
  (declaration
    (attributes
      (identifier)
      (identifier)
      (identifier
        (MISSING _identifier)))
    (definition
      (identifier)
      (number)))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (match_arm
      (number)
      (ERROR)
      (number))
    (match_arm
      (hole)
      (ERROR)
      (number))))

==============================
Structure Instance With Extends
==============================

def ellipsisStruct (f : Foo) := { f with a := 1 }

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    body: (structure_instance
      extends: (identifier)
      (field_assignment
        name: (identifier)
        value: (number)))))
